SEARCH
Package org.flossware.jeventbus.api

Class Message.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.flossware.jeventbus.api.Message.Builder
Enclosing class:
Message
public static class Message.Builder extends Object
Builder for constructing Message instances. ID and timestamp are auto-generated if not provided.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder()

  • Method Details

    • id

      public Message.Builder id(String id)
      Sets the message ID. Auto-generated if not set.
      Parameters:
      id - the message identifier
      Returns:
      this builder

    • topic

      public Message.Builder topic(String topic)
      Sets the message topic for routing.
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic name
      Returns:
      this builder

    • sourceApplicationId

      public Message.Builder sourceApplicationId(String sourceApplicationId)
      Sets the source application identifier.
      Parameters:
      sourceApplicationId - the ID of the sending application
      Returns:
      this builder

    • headers

      public Message.Builder headers(Map<String,Object> headers)
      Sets the complete map of message headers. Replaces any previously added headers.
      Parameters:
      headers - the headers map
      Returns:
      this builder

    • header

      public Message.Builder header(String key, Object value)
      Adds a single message header. Can be called multiple times to build headers incrementally.
      Parameters:
      key - the header key
      value - the header value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • payload

      public Message.Builder payload(byte[] payload)
      Sets the message payload.
      Parameters:
      payload - the binary message content
      Returns:
      this builder

    • timestamp

      public Message.Builder timestamp(long timestamp)
      Sets the message timestamp. Auto-generated to current time if not set.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - the timestamp in milliseconds since epoch
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public Message build()
      Builds the Message instance. Auto-generates ID and timestamp if not provided.
      Returns:
      a new Message with the configured values
